text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 408 

REDUCED_OOPT_CS 

LABEL: Plan Offers Reduced Post Out-of-Pocket (OOP) Threshold Cost-Sharing Amounts 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the plan offers reduced cost sharing in the post out-of-pocket 
threshold (catastrophic) phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: REDUCED_OOPT_CS 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes
